en_title: The Hunt for Team 7 Begins: Naruto Filmmakers Launch a Massive Global Casting Search to Find the Stars of the Live-Action Movie
cn_title: 《火影忍者》真人电影启动全球选角
subtitle: 寻找第七班主演
opus_summary: 狮门影业与导演德斯汀·丹尼尔·克雷顿宣布，为《火影忍者》真人电影启动全球选角，寻找鸣人、佐助和小樱的演员。影片目前处于前期制作阶段。

paragraphs.en: Lionsgate and director Destin Daniel Cretton announced via social media Thursday that they will launch a global casting search for their live-action Naruto movie, based on the massively popular manga franchise.
paragraphs.cn: 狮门影业与导演德斯汀·丹尼尔·克雷顿周四通过社交媒体宣布，将为改编自超人气漫画的《火影忍者》真人电影启动全球选角。

paragraphs.en: The global casting search will be for the roles of Team 7’s three young shinobi Naruto, Sasuke and Sakura. Lionsgate said casting for other characters will follow.
paragraphs.cn: 本次选角将寻找第七班三位年轻忍者鸣人、佐助和小樱的饰演者。狮门影业表示，其他角色的选角将随后展开。

paragraphs.en: Kishimoto-sensei's stories have inspired generations of fans around the world, and it’s an honor to bring his world and characters to the big screen in live action for the very first time. I'm thrilled to kick off this worldwide casting search for our Team 7 and to bring the incredible universe of Naruto to life, Cretton said.
paragraphs.cn: 克雷顿表示：「岸本老师的故事启发了全世界数代粉丝，能首次以真人形式把他的世界和角色带上大银幕是我的荣幸。我非常激动能为第七班开启这场全球选角，并让《火影忍者》的精彩宇宙活起来。」

paragraphs.en: Masashi Kishimoto said that Naruto was truly becoming a Hollywood movie and that he was eagerly awaiting the remarkable and passionate actors who would bring his characters to the film.
paragraphs.cn: 原作者岸本齐史也表示，《火影忍者》真的要成为好莱坞电影了；他期待与那些非凡且充满热情的演员相遇，并在银幕上见到自己的角色。

paragraphs.en: Naruto is currently heading into pre-production. Director Destin Daniel Cretton’s next film, Spider-Man: Brand New Day, opens July 31st.
paragraphs.cn: 《火影忍者》目前正进入前期制作阶段。克雷顿下一部电影《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》将于7月31日上映。
